parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ Id: $('Code · Prep lead').first().json.client_id, last_seen: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.content:
## Leadvyne · Engine v3

### New in v3
- **Active flag check**: suspended clients (active=No) are silently dropped at ctx step
- **Rate limiting / debounce**: drops duplicate webhook fires within 4s per user (via LastMsgAt field)
- **Structured intent**: LLM returns {intent, data} JSON — booking times extracted
- **Conversation memory**: history stored in NocoDB ConvHistory; last 8 exchanges sent to FAQ LLM
- **Lead qualification**: configurable qualifying questions stored in QualAnswers
- **Anti-loop protection**: 3 identical consecutive bot replies → force human escalation
- **Richer handoff**: sends message + adds 'human-requested' label in Chatwoot (retry x3)
- **Retry on send**: Chatwoot send retries up to 3× with 2s backoff
- **Analytics logging**: every processed message logged to control NocoDB analytics table
- **Last seen tracking**: client record updated with last_seen timestamp for health monitoring

### Placeholders to set
1. NocoDB · Get tenant: REPLACE_CONTROL_WORKSPACE / PROJECT / CLIENTS_TABLE
2. HTTP · Log analytics: https://whizz.aiingo.com, m2in19v8n7phitr, nc_pat_n5dMpFolDUQNtkCWGiCJnX45xXWUoFnZdsQkwEyF
3. HTTP · Update last seen: same as above

### NocoDB schema additions needed
**Leads table:** ConvHistory (Long text), QualAnswers (Long text), BookingTime (Single line), LastMsgAt (DateTime)
**Clients table:** last_seen (DateTime), n8n_workflow_id (Single line)
**Analytics table (new, in control NocoDB):** ClientId, ClientName, Phone, Intent, Route, Stage, NextStage, ResponseMs (Number), IsError (Checkbox), ErrorMsg, Timestamp (DateTime)
